name: JMR Lakeside Golf Simulator & Retail
about: JMR Lakeside Golf Simulator & Retail is a virtual golf venue located in downtown McCall, Idaho. It offers year-round golf access featuring virtual Trackman technology, catering to individual practice, lessons, leagues, and special events. The facility is part of the larger Jug Mountain Ranch resort, providing a premium golf experience with a focus on technology and convenience. The venue is open daily and offers private party rentals, making it a versatile option for both casual players and event hosting.
why_golfers_like_it: Virtual Trackman technology for realistic ball and club tracking
Year-round golf access regardless of weather conditions
Private event and league hosting capabilities

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant service available at Clubhouse Restaurant with a fantastic menu

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides virtual golf services, so players can use their own clubs or potentially demo equipment available at the pro shop.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The facility has its own restaurant service, so outside food and drink policies are not specified, but patrons can enjoy on-site dining options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Virtual golf sessions vary in length depending on the number of players and activities chosen, but typical 18-hole rounds typically take 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue focuses on adult golfers and special events, with no specific mention of junior programs or kid-friendly amenities.
